zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
目前以太坊/美元处于1687.01美元附近，短期价格呈现轻微回落，但整体仍维持在20日均线1653.80美元上方，显示多头仍具支撑。高低点1692/1677.92暗示日内波动幅度有限，市场短线震荡特征明显，投资者应关注价格在此区间的承压和支撑反应。

MACD值为7.34050，显示多头动能存在，但缺乏信号线确认，暗示趋势尚未完全明朗。缺少RSI数据需谨慎判断超买或超卖状态，但价格维持在均线之上说明多头情绪仍占优。若MACD进一步向上发散，可考虑顺势跟进。

关键支撑位关注1678美元附近，若失守可能引发短线回调至1655美元区域；阻力位在1692美元附近，突破后有望冲击1700美元关口。整体来看，支撑稳固、阻力有限，短线多空分歧尚存。

交易策略上，建议低位靠近支撑时可适量布局多单，止损设在1675美元以下；若价格企稳突破1692美元，可考虑加仓顺势跟进。高位谨慎追涨，短线操作以轻仓、快速止盈为宜，保持风控优先。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently consolidating around $1,687 after testing a daily high near $1,692 and a low of $1,677.92. Price action suggests a neutral-to-slightly-bullish bias, as ETH remains above the 20-period SMA at $1,653.8, providing a firm short-term support. The narrow daily range indicates indecision among traders, with momentum appearing muted, despite the slight 0.15% decline over the past 24 hours.

The MACD value of 7.34, though not accompanied by a signal line, implies upward momentum may be present, albeit weak. Without the RSI for confirmation, it is prudent to watch for divergence or overextension signals before committing to directional trades. Market participants should note the psychological resistance around $1,700, which has constrained upside attempts in recent sessions, while intraday support near $1,670 may act as a safety net for buyers.

Technical patterns point to a short-term range between $1,670 and $1,700, with potential breakout triggers occurring on sustained moves above or below these thresholds. Traders might consider accumulating on dips closer to the SMA or $1,670 support, while cautious profit-taking could be executed near the $1,700 resistance zone. Observing volume and confirmation from complementary indicators can enhance trade reliability in this consolidating phase.

Looking ahead, Ethereum’s trend may hinge on a decisive break above $1,700 to resume upward momentum, potentially targeting $1,720-$1,730. Conversely, a breach of $1,670 could invite deeper retracements toward $1,650. Risk management through stop-loss orders and position sizing is advised, given the current low-volatility environment. Maintaining discipline around key support and resistance levels will be crucial for navigating ETH/USD in the coming sessions.
